description: Frozen regression floors for the five-variant ablation and cross-scenario generalization. Floors are tripwires with generous margins over the 2026-07-23 baseline (torch 2.13 cpu), not aspirations. Scenario floors are Brier-only: ranking metrics are unstable at this budget (distractor ROC observably flips between 0.0 and 1.0 across budgets), and flooring them would flake CI.
